title: The Great Mr. Nobody
writer: Ben Markson, Kenneth Gamet, Harold Titus
actors: Eddie Albert, Joan Leslie, Alan Hale
plot: Perpetual optimist "Dreamy" Smith aspires to quit his job as newspaper publicity drudge and sail the world. But life--and his editor--conspire against him. Not only does the car he intends using as the boat's down payment roll int...
